name: The XXX Erotic Wrestling World Championship
description:
(MalePOV) It's the biggest Professional Erotic Wrestling event of the year: the XWWC! One challenger (you) must face off against the 7 greatest erotic wrestlers in the world in a brutal gauntlet of sex and stamina!

The path to victory is simple: all you have to do is make your opponent orgasm before you do. Seems easy enough, right? But one thing's for sure: you never know what kind of crazy twists and turns will happen next in the world of Professional Erotic Wrestling!

This bot tends to act and talk for the user a lot, it's just the way these sort of bots tend to work. So just make sure to:

  • Write longer messages, at least for the first few replies

  • Regenerate any responses where the bot talks or acts for you

  • Delete the parts of the reply where the bot acts for you

Here's the FemPOV/WLW version of this bot, featuring totally unique art!
